sql:
SELECT RF_PLI_002_CarteraGobCLP.Fec_Pro, RF_PLI_002_CarteraGobCLP.Cod_Emp, RF_PLI_002_CarteraGobCLP.Moneda, RF_PLI_002_CarteraGobCLP.Cod_Pro, RF_PLI_002_CarteraGobCLP.Cod_Sub_Pro, RF_PLI_002_CarteraGobCLP.Nemotecnico, RF_PLI_002_CarteraGobCLP.Instrumento, RF_PLI_002_CarteraGobCLP.VP_Cap_Amort, RF_PLI_002_CarteraGobCLP.VP_Int_Total, RF_PLI_002_CarteraGobCLP.Dias_Vcto, (RF_PLI_002_CarteraGobCLP.VP_Cap_Amort+RF_PLI_002_CarteraGobCLP.VP_Int_Total)/RF_PLI_003_CarteraGobCLP_MonTotal.VP_Flujo AS Ponderador INTO RF_CarteraGobCLP_Pond
FROM RF_PLI_002_CarteraGobCLP INNER JOIN RF_PLI_003_CarteraGobCLP_MonTotal ON (RF_PLI_002_CarteraGobCLP.Cod_Pro = RF_PLI_003_CarteraGobCLP_MonTotal.Cod_Pro) AND (RF_PLI_002_CarteraGobCLP.Moneda = RF_PLI_003_CarteraGobCLP_MonTotal.Moneda);

SELECT RF_PLI_001_CarteraInv.Fec_Pro, RF_PLI_001_CarteraInv.Cod_Emp, RF_PLI_001_CarteraInv.Moneda, RF_PLI_001_CarteraInv.Cod_Pro, RF_PLI_001_CarteraInv.Cod_Sub_Pro, RF_PLI_001_CarteraInv.Nemotecnico, RF_PLI_001_CarteraInv.Instrumento, RF_PLI_001_CarteraInv.VP_Cap_Amort, RF_PLI_001_CarteraInv.VP_Int_Total, RF_PLI_001_CarteraInv.Dias_Vcto
FROM RF_PLI_001_CarteraInv
WHERE RF_PLI_001_CarteraInv.Instrumento='BCP' 
OR 
RF_PLI_001_CarteraInv.Instrumento='BTP' 
or 
RF_PLI_001_CarteraInv.Instrumento='PDB';
